title: AHTNA GLOBAL HOLDS BLESSING IN KAUAI, HAWAII
summary: On November 18, 2021, Ahtna Global and the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (USF&WS) held a traditional site blessing at our Repair Existing Intake Construction at Hanalei National Wildlife Refuge project in Kauai County, Hawaii. title: 2021 AHTNA/CRNA FOSTER CHILDREN ANGEL TREE A HUGE SUCCESS FOR THE 4TH YEAR IN A ROW
summary: Foster children in the Copper River area had a little merrier Christmas this year because of a combined effort of giving. For the fourth year in a row, Ahtna worked with the Copper River Native Association (CRNA) to sponsor a Children’s Angel Tree for 35 foster children. Arrangements were made with...

title: AHTNA’S IRC STAFF’S AMAZING ACT OF KINDNESS
